description_long: This object is a large, cylindrical stone with a dark, weathered exterior and a hollowed-out center. The outer surface is rough and matte, showing signs of age and exposure, while the interior reveals a yellowish, worn stone texture with radial cutouts resembling spokes. The cutouts form a symmetrical pattern, giving the object a wheel-like appearance, though it is clearly made of stone. The stone's surface is uneven, with visible pitting and irregularities, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements for some time. The coloration transitions from a dark, almost black exterior to a lighter, yellowish interior, with the inner surface showing more pronounced weathering and discoloration. This object could serve as a decorative or functional barrier in an urban environment, such as a park or plaza.
description: A large, cylindrical, hollow stone with a dark, rough exterior and a yellow, weathered interior featuring radial cutouts. The object resembles a stone wheel or ornamental barrier.
description_view_0: The view shows the solid, dark, and rough cylindrical side of the stone, with no visible openings or interior details.
description_view_1: This view reveals the hollow center with yellow, weathered stone and radial cutouts, resembling spokes in a wheel.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side view displays the dark, rough cylindrical surface without interior visibility.
description_view_3: The hollow interior and radial cutouts are visible, with the yellow, weathered stone surface and spoke-like pattern clearly shown.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or barrier on pavement
attribute_pattern: Radial cutouts forming a regular, spoke-like pattern on the interior surface; exterior is mottled and irregular.
attribute_weathering: Rough and pitted exterior with significant discoloration and surface wear, especially on the interior yellow stone.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with smooth pavement or manicured landscaping, serving as a visual and physical barrier; may collect debris or rainwater inside.
